title: Bridge Essay: Meditation-Induced Self-Boundary Flexibility and Prosociality: A MEG and Behavio

body.text: This bridge paper connects the esoteric/philosophical concept of **Emptiness** with mechanistic science from PubMed/MEDLINE.
**Bridge rationale:** Emptiness — dissolution of self, DMN decoupling, ego dissolution.
**Phase context:** Self-dissolution — ego dissolution, DMN decoupling, non-self in neuroscience.

**Meditation-Induced Self-Boundary Flexibility and Prosociality: A MEG and Behavioral Measures Study.** — Brain sciences (2024). DOI: 10.3390/brainsci14121181. PMID: 39766380. In the last decade, empirical studies on the beneficial effects of meditation on prosocial capacities have accumulated, but the underlying mechanisms remain unclear. Buddhist sources state that liberating oneself from a fixed view of the self by gaining access to its transitory and malleable nature leads to increased compassion and other prosocial traits.
